# US-009: Respond to mid-day check-in - Implementation Plan

**Generated by:** Archetipo Planning Team
**Date:** 2026-05-06

---

## User Story

**Epic:** EP-003 - Check-in & Retrospective
**Priority:** HIGH | **Story Points:** 5

**Story**
As a developer, I want to respond at mid-day for each task I committed to with a status of On Track / Blocked / Task Changed, so that I can surface my real state without having to attend a meeting.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] At the scheduled mid-day time, the dev page shows a check-in prompt for each committed task
- [ ] For each task the dev can pick exactly one status: On Track, Blocked, or Task Changed
- [ ] Selecting Blocked allows an optional free-text note
- [ ] Submitted check-ins are persisted and timestamped
- [ ] Once submitted, the prompt is replaced by a summary of the responses on the same page

---

## Technical Solution

We introduce a `CheckIn` aggregate keyed by `(commitmentId, taskId)` and extend the dev-page state machine from US-008 with two derived states - `awaiting_checkin` (mid-day window open, no submission yet) and `checked_in` (submission complete, summary rendered). The mid-day trigger is the existing `MID_DAY_HOUR/MINUTE/ORG_TIMEZONE` config from US-008, evaluated by a new pure helper `isCheckInOpen(now, config)` that mirrors `isCommitmentEditable` with opposite polarity. A single server action `submitCheckInAction` writes all per-task entries in one transaction; submission is all-or-nothing (every committed task must carry a status) so US-011's "silent" detection has a clean boolean to reason about. Single-shot per day per AC: once submitted, the page swaps to a read-only summary. The alternative of denormalising daily status onto `Task` was rejected because it conflates per-day check-in state with task lifecycle and would erase history every day.

- **Model `CheckIn`** in `prisma/schema.prisma`: `id`, `commitmentId` (FK with `onDelete: Cascade`), `taskId` (FK with `onDelete: Restrict` to preserve history if a task is later soft-deleted), `status CheckInStatus` enum `{ on_track, blocked, task_changed }`, `blockerNote String?`, `submittedAt DateTime @default(now())`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`. Unique `@@unique([commitmentId, taskId])` enforces one entry per task. Index `[commitmentId]` for the page-load query.
- **Schedule config**: extend `src/lib/config/schedule.ts` (introduced by US-008) with placeholder constants `END_OF_DAY_HOUR`, `END_OF_DAY_MINUTE` so `isCheckInOpen` has a clean upper bound; US-010 will reuse the same constants without rework.
- **Helpers in `src/lib/checkin.ts`**:
  - `isCheckInOpen(now, config): boolean` - true between mid-day trigger and end-of-day cutoff in org-tz.
  - `findTodayCheckIns(commitmentId)` - Prisma lookup returning all rows for a commitment.
  - `mapCheckInState(commitment, checkIns, now, config)` - extends the US-008 state machine with `awaiting_checkin` and `checked_in`.
- **Validation schema** `src/lib/validation/checkin.ts`: zod with `superRefine` enforcing (a) `blockerNote` allowed and capped at 500 chars only when `status === blocked`, otherwise rejected; (b) entries length and `taskId` set must equal the commitment's committed task set (verified by the action against DB).
- **Server action `submitCheckInAction`** in `src/app/dev/[token]/actions.ts`: input `{ token, entries: Array<{ taskId, status, blockerNote? }> }`. Pipeline (transaction):
  1. Resolve profile via `findActiveProfileByToken` (US-006). Token invalid or profile soft-deleted → neutral generic error.
  2. Compute `today` in org-tz, load today's `Commitment` via `findTodayCommitment`. None → neutral error.
  3. Verify `isCheckInOpen(now)` - false → "Check-in not open yet" or "Check-in window closed".
  4. Reject if any `CheckIn` already exists for this commitment (single-shot per AC).
  5. Apply zod validation; verify `entries` taskIds set equals the commitment's `CommitmentTask.taskId` set (no missing, no extra).
  6. `prisma.checkIn.createMany` batch insert; rely on the `@@unique` constraint as a last-line race guard.
  7. `revalidatePath('/dev/' + token)`.
- **Page wiring** (`src/app/dev/[token]/page.tsx`): after the existing US-006/US-007/US-008 fetches, also load `findTodayCheckIns(commitment?.id)`. Compute the extended state via `mapCheckInState`. Mount `CheckInForm` for `awaiting_checkin`, `CheckInSummary` for `checked_in`; other states keep mounting the existing US-008 components.
- **Component `CheckInForm`** (`src/app/dev/[token]/_components/CheckInForm.tsx`, client for live counter and conditional textarea): one row per committed task showing title plus a radio group `On Track | Blocked | Task Changed`; selecting Blocked reveals a textarea (max 500, live char counter); submit-all CTA "Submit check-in"; uses `useFormState` with `submitCheckInAction`; inline error banner when not all rows are answered.
- **Component `CheckInSummary`** (server): read-only list with status badges (green `On Track`, amber `Blocked`, slate `Task Changed`); blocker note rendered as muted secondary line under the row when present; header "Mid-day check-in submitted at HH:MM" derived from the earliest `submittedAt`.
- **Reuse**: `findActiveProfileByToken` (US-006), `getTodaysTasksForDev` (US-007), `findTodayCommitment` + schedule config (US-008). No new npm dependencies, no changes to `Task`, `DevProfile`, `Sprint`, or `Commitment` models.
- **Visual reference**: mockups in `docs/mockups/US-009/`; consistent with the dev-page shell from US-006 and the existing mockup palette/typography.

---

## Test Strategy

We verify the pure domain at unit level, the transactional invariants at integration level, and the three observable states (awaiting / submitted / closed) end-to-end. Particular attention to the single-shot guarantee, the conditional blocker-note rule, and the entries-set match against the commitment.

- **Unit** - `isCheckInOpen(now, config)`: false before mid-day trigger, true at trigger minute, true mid-window, false at end-of-day cutoff.
- **Unit** - `mapCheckInState`: locked + zero rows = `awaiting_checkin`; locked + complete rows = `checked_in`; window not yet open keeps US-008 states untouched.
- **Unit** - zod schema: rejects `blockerNote` when status is not `blocked`; rejects note longer than 500 chars; trims and normalises empty note to `null`; rejects non-enum status.
- **Integration** - `submitCheckInAction` happy path: writes N rows in a single transaction with correct `submittedAt`.
- **Integration** - re-submission rejected (single-shot): a second call after a successful one returns a controlled error and writes nothing.
- **Integration** - partial submission rejected: entries missing one of the committed tasks → error, no writes.
- **Integration** - extraneous taskId rejected: entries containing a task not in the commitment → error, no writes.
- **Integration** - status `task_changed` with a non-empty `blockerNote` is rejected by zod.
- **Integration** - closed window: `now` mocked before mid-day or after end-of-day → error, no writes.
- **Integration** - soft-deleted profile (US-002) → neutral error, no writes.
- **Integration** - concurrent submissions for the same commitment: only one wins via the unique constraint, the other fails gracefully.
- **E2E (Playwright)** - happy path: mock `now` post-trigger, fill all rows including one Blocked with a note, submit, assert the page swaps to `CheckInSummary` with the correct badges, note, and timestamp.
- **E2E (Playwright)** - validation: submit with one row unanswered → inline error visible, page state unchanged.
- **E2E (Playwright)** - conditional note: select Blocked → textarea + counter appear; switch back to On Track → textarea disappears and any typed text is discarded on submit.
- **E2E (Playwright)** - pre-trigger: mock `now` before mid-day → page stays in US-008 locked-awaiting view, no check-in form rendered.

| Status | # | Task | Description | Type | Dependencies |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| DONE | TASK-01 | Prisma model `CheckIn` + enum `CheckInStatus` | Add the model to `schema.prisma` with FKs, unique `(commitmentId, taskId)`, index, and run `prisma db push`. | Impl | - |
| DONE | TASK-02 | Extend schedule config | Add `END_OF_DAY_HOUR` / `END_OF_DAY_MINUTE` placeholder constants to `src/lib/config/schedule.ts` (env-driven with fallback). | Impl | - |
| DONE | TASK-03 | Domain helpers `checkin.ts` | Implement `isCheckInOpen` and `mapCheckInState` as pure functions extending the US-008 state machine. | Impl | TASK-02 |
| DONE | TASK-04 | Unit tests on domain helpers | Cover trigger and cutoff boundaries, state-machine transitions across all four states. | Test | TASK-03 |
| DONE | TASK-05 | Prisma helper `findTodayCheckIns` | Add lookup of check-in rows by commitment, used by the page and the action. | Impl | TASK-01 |
| DONE | TASK-06 | Zod schema `submitCheckInSchema` | Create `src/lib/validation/checkin.ts` with status enum, conditional `blockerNote`, length cap, set-match scaffolding. | Impl | - |
| DONE | TASK-07 | Server action `submitCheckInAction` | Implement token resolution, window check, single-shot guard, set-match against commitment, transactional `createMany`, `revalidatePath`. | Impl | TASK-01, TASK-03, TASK-05, TASK-06 |
| DONE | TASK-08 | Integration tests on the action | Cover happy path, single-shot rejection, partial/extraneous entries, conditional note rule, closed window, soft-deleted profile, concurrent submissions. | Test | TASK-07 |
| DONE | TASK-09 | `CheckInForm` component (client) | Build the per-task radio form with conditional Blocked textarea + live char counter, `useFormState`, inline error. | Impl | TASK-07 |
| DONE | TASK-10 | `CheckInSummary` component (server) | Read-only list with colored status badges, blocker note line, header timestamp. | Impl | TASK-01 |
| DONE | TASK-11 | Wire components into `/dev/[token]` page | Load check-ins, compute extended state via `mapCheckInState`, mount the right component for `awaiting_checkin` / `checked_in` without disturbing US-008 branches. | Impl | TASK-05, TASK-09, TASK-10 |
| DONE | TASK-12 | E2E happy path | Playwright with mocked `now` post-trigger: fill all rows including Blocked + note, submit, assert summary with badges and timestamp. | Test | TASK-11 |
| DONE | TASK-13 | E2E validation + conditional note | Playwright: unanswered row inline error; Blocked → textarea reveal; switch to On Track → textarea hides and note discarded. | Test | TASK-11 |
| DONE | TASK-14 | E2E pre-trigger | Playwright with mocked `now` before mid-day: assert no check-in form is rendered, US-008 locked-awaiting view stays. | Test | TASK-11 |
